seoTitle: Upper Pinelands vs Upper Tenthill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Upper Pinelands and Upper Tenthill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Upper Pinelands vs Upper Tenthill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Pinelands and Upper Tenthill.
heading: Upper Pinelands vs Upper Tenthill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Pinelands, Queensland and Upper Tenthill, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Pinelands has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Upper Tenthill (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Pinelands or Upper Tenthill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Pinelands has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Upper Tenthill scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Pinelands scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Tenthill scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Pinelands or Upper Tenthill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Pinelands has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
